# jellyfin_library (Data Source)

Looks up a Jellyfin media library (virtual folder) by name.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "jellyfin_library" "movies" {
  name = "Movies"
}

output "movie_paths" {
  value = data.jellyfin_library.movies.paths
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) The library name.

### Read-Only

- `collection_type` (String) The collection type (e.g., `movies`, `tvshows`, `music`).
- `item_id` (String) The internal item ID assigned by Jellyfin.
- `paths` (List of String) List of file system paths for this library.
